parameters.query:
SELECT 
  s.name AS subreddit_name,
  s.active AS subreddit_active,
  p.id AS post_id,
  p.title AS post_title,
  p.content AS post_content,
  p.author AS post_author,
  p.url AS post_url,
  p.created_at AS post_created_at,
  c.id AS comment_id,
  c.author AS comment_author,
  c.content AS comment_content,
  c.created_at AS comment_created_at
FROM reddit_subreddits_monitored s
LEFT JOIN reddit_posts p ON p.subreddit_id = s.id AND p.processed = 0
LEFT JOIN reddit_comments c ON c.post_id = p.id
ORDER BY s.name, p.created_at DESC, c.created_at DESC;

SELECT 
  w.workspace_name,
  pgp_sym_decrypt(w.token, '{{ $env.ENCRYPTION_KEY || 'default-secret-key' }}') AS token,
  pgp_sym_decrypt(w.d_cookie, '{{ $env.ENCRYPTION_KEY || 'default-secret-key' }}') AS d_cookie,
  pgp_sym_decrypt(w.d_s_cookie, '{{ $env.ENCRYPTION_KEY || 'default-secret-key' }}') AS d_s_cookie,
  c.channel_id
FROM slack_workspaces_monitored w
JOIN slack_channels_monitored c ON c.workspace_id = w.id
WHERE w.active = true AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1;
